INDOOR and OUTDOOR DINING

We currently offer indoor dining at all of our locations!

Our Englewood Cliffs location also currently offers an outdoor covered dining patio!

RESERVATIONS

Unfortunately, we do not accept reservations or call aheads.

Seating is available only on a first come, first serve basis!

BROWNSTONE BRUNCH BOX

Order your HANUKKAH, CHRISTMAS and WINTER Brunch Boxes today!!

TO ORDER OUR BROWNSTONE BRUNCH BOXES AS SEEN ON INSTAGRAM, PLEASE VISIT US AT:

www.brownstonebrunchbox.com

OR EMAIL US AT

brownstonebrunchbox@gmail.com

WE ALSO SHIP NATIONWIDE ON GOLDBELLY!

 STORE HOURS

 SPECIAL HOLIDAY HOURS

(APPLICABLE ALL STORES):

Christmas Eve (Fri, 12/24):  8am – 3pm

Christmas Day (Sat, 12/25):  8am – 3pm

New Year’s Eve (Fri, 12/31):  8am – 3pm

New Year’s Day (Sat, 1/1):  8am – 4pm

ENGLEWOOD CLIFFS HOURS:

SUN – WED 8am – 4pm

THURS – SAT 8am – 8pm

EDGEWATER LOCATION HOURS:

SUN – THURS 8am – 4pm

FRI – SAT 8am – 8pm

BRICK LOCATION HOURS:

SUN – WED 8am – 4pm

THURS – SAT 8am – 8pm

 

DRIVE-IN MOVIE NIGHT

 OUR ENGLEWOOD CLIFFS LOATION OFFERS DRIVE-IN MOVIE NIGHTS FOR THE WHE FAMILY TO ENJOY!

UPCOMING SHOWTIMES

STAY TUNED FOR SOME HOLIDAY FAVORITES COMING UP!

RESERVE EARLY AS WE DO SELL OUT!!

Please call 201-945-4800, Ext. 2 to make your reservation.

Note our full food and drink menu is available, along with a specialty shake highlighting the movie’s theme! We also offer popcorn and candy just like at the movies!

 

 Call Ahead Store Pickup

Delivery Partners

UberEats
DoorDash
GrubHub

  

CALL US AT 201-945-4800

 …please stay safe all, let us feed you…

DINERS, DRIVE-INS AND DIVES

Food network’s Diners, Drive-Ins, and Dives featured Brownstone on their “Big Breakfast” episode. We’re bringing this magic to Edgewater! Check out the clip!
